summary: Tested both new features: (1) Lecture deletion bug fix - DELETE /api/lectures cleans orphaned attendance records correctly. (2) Send final results notifications feature (JSON, Excel, template, permissions) - all working. Backend: 12/12 pytest cases PASS. Frontend: send-final-results page renders correctly, all flows work (select all/clear/per-student/search/template download/navigation from course-students). Found 2 minor backend issues + 1 testability issue.

minor.issue: Throws 500 (bson.errors.InvalidId) when course_id is not a valid ObjectId hex string. Should validate format and return 400/404. server.py:2163 calls ObjectId(course_id) without try/except.

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid attributes are NOT rendered to DOM (only 1 of 11+ found). React Native Web requires testID prop, not data-testid. Currently selectors data-testid='mark-all-pass-btn', 'send-final-results-nav-btn', 'count-pass', etc. don't exist in DOM. Functionally everything works via text selectors, but automated tests cannot use data-testid.

integration_issues.issue: Console error: 'TypeError: lecturesList is not iterable' in calculateStudentStats. Doesn't break UI but pollutes console.

action_items: Replace data-testid={...} with testID={...} in /app/frontend/app/send-final-results.tsx and /app/frontend/app/course-students.tsx. React Native Web converts testID to data-testid automatically; raw data-testid props are stripped.
Add ObjectId format validation in server.py _send_final_results_to_students (~line 2163): wrap ObjectId(course_id) in try/except to return 404 on InvalidId rather than 500.
Fix lecturesList iteration error in course-students.tsx calculateStudentStats - ensure lecturesList is defaulted to [] when API returns non-array.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend send_final_results endpoint correctly validates result values (pass/fail/ناجح/راسب), persists notifications with is_final_result=true, and returns failed list for invalid student numbers.
DELETE /api/lectures correctly removes attendance records (verified before/after counts).
Permissions enforced correctly: teacher180156 returns 403, unauthenticated returns 401/403.
Excel upload correctly accepts Arabic column names (رقم القيد, النتيجة, الدرجة, ملاحظات).
Notification message contains student_number and result keyword as required.
Frontend test IDs not rendered in DOM - this is a React Native Web prop convention issue (use testID, not data-testid).

success_rate.backend: 100% (12/12 pytest passed; 1 known minor issue around invalid ObjectId returning 500)
success_rate.frontend: 95% (all functional flows work; data-testid attributes not rendered - testability issue)

seed_data_creation: Sent multiple final-result notifications to students enrolled in course 698f0000d803b27aab0120af (دراسات حضرموت) during testing. Student محمد أحمد علي (12345) now has 8+ final-result notifications.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both lecture-deletion bug fix and send-final-results feature are working end-to-end. Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_lecture_and_final_results_pytest.py covers: lecture deletion cleans attendance, attendance endpoint filters deleted lectures, template download, JSON send (Arabic + English keywords), Excel upload, invalid student handling, invalid result value, teacher permission denial, unauthenticated denial, course not found, invalid ObjectId format. Frontend uses Expo Router; login: fill 2 inputs then click 'تسجيل الدخول' via get_by_text. Direct URL navigation works after login. Important: the dev used `data-testid` props but React Native Web requires `testID` prop (which RNW maps to data-testid for native HTML elements). On <View>/<Text> components data-testid is dropped. Use text-based selectors for now.
rca_of_issues: 1) Invalid ObjectId 500: server.py:2163 calls ObjectId(course_id) without exception handling; raises bson.errors.InvalidId (uncaught). Fix: wrap in try/except InvalidId -> raise HTTPException(404). 2) data-testid not in DOM: React Native Web only forwards specific props; testID is recognized and converted to data-testid. Plain HTML attributes like data-testid are filtered out for RN components. Fix: rename all `data-testid=` to `testID=` in .tsx files.
